case_title: DALE CHUNG VS. MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $661.29 FILED BY CHUNG, DALE AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *(AGENT FOR SERVICE: C T CORPORATION SYSTEM)* FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUNG, DALE AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *AGENT FOR SERVICE: CT CORPORATION SYSTEM* SERVED APR-16-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-30-2012 AT 3:30PM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUNG, DALE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MECAL, INC. DBA MIDAS MECAL, INC. DBA MIDAS IS ADDED AS A DEFENDANT AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST MIDAS INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
